parameters.description: Preferred language for response messages (`id` or `en`).
parameters.name: Accept-Language

parameters.description: Page number (default 1). Accepts offset for backwards compatibility.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Number of items per page (default 20, max 100)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Number of items to skip (deprecated, use page instead)
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Filter by order status: completed, payment_pending, verification_pending, cancelled
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter by payment status: paid, unpaid, expired
parameters.name: paymentStatus

parameters.description: Search by customer name or email
parameters.name: search
